mapper.select: SELECT coord_id, region_id, point_order, x_coordinate, y_coordinate, created_at FROM region_coordinates WHERE region_id = #{regionId} ORDER BY point_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO region_coordinates (region_id, point_order, x_coordinate, y_coordinate) VALUES (#{regionId}, #{pointOrder}, #{xCoordinate}, #{yCoordinate})

INSERT INTO region_coordinates (region_id, point_order, x_coordinate, y_coordinate) VALUES
(#{coord.regionId}, #{coord.pointOrder}, #{coord.xCoordinate}, #{coord.yCoordinate})
